activities.title: Normalize WS Snapshot Contract
activities.description: transport-ws.ts:getSnapshot() returns explicit wsFrameCount + other boundary fields, replacing the {...wsObs} spread that exported the internal frameCount name and broke downstream consumers

activities.title: Classify Empty Turn From Normalized Snapshot
activities.description: sse.ts flush block reads transportSnapshot.wsFrameCount and feeds the classifier; classifier predicate ladder per DD-9 selects ws_truncation or ws_no_frames based on the now-present numeric value

activities.title: Persist Classified Evidence
activities.description: empty-turn-log.ts appends a JSONL line containing wsFrameCount; subsequent operator queries can distinguish ws_truncation vs ws_no_frames vs unclassified

arrows.label: JSONL line with wsFrameCount + classified causeFamily
